description: req short-circuit on empty (§55.12). Same field, but emptied (typed "x" then cleared to ""): req FAILS, so the remaining length + pattern validators are SKIPPED and errors = [.Required] ONLY (not three noise errors). <errors of=@signup.pw all/> renders exactly 1 .scrml-error.
rationale: §55.12 short-circuit rule: 'when req fails on an empty cell, the remaining validators are SKIPPED. Only .Required is reported.' Reasoning: vacuous failures on empty values would be noise. Contrast the compose case (non-empty → both length+pattern reported).
